query:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT address, max(date) AS d
  FROM dbt.int_execution_tokens_balances_daily
  PREWHERE 1 = 1
    /*__FILTER_CONDITIONS__*/
  WHERE date >= today() - 30
  GROUP BY address
)
SELECT
  t.address AS address,
  t.token_address AS token_address,
  t.symbol AS symbol,
  t.token_class AS token_class,
  t.date AS date,
  t.balance AS balance,
  coalesce(t.balance_usd, 0) AS balance_usd
FROM dbt.int_execution_tokens_balances_daily AS t
INNER JOIN latest AS l ON l.address = t.address AND l.d = t.date
WHERE t.balance > 0
ORDER BY balance_usd DESC
LIMIT 500
